seoTitle: Coongbar vs Coopernook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Coongbar and Coopernook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coongbar and Coopernook.
heading: Coongbar vs Coopernook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coongbar, New South Wales and Coopernook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coopernook has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Coongbar (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coongbar or Coopernook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coongbar has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Coopernook scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coongbar scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Coopernook scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coongbar or Coopernook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coopernook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
